navigation.phoneValid: Please enter a valid phone number

banner.title: Design Your Own Floor Plates
banner.description: Customize, preview, and order — all in one place. Create the perfect floor plate for your project with instant pricing and CAD preview

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.description: We create smart, easy-to-use tools that simplify floor plate design and ordering. Our goal is to make layout customization fast, accurate, and effortless for everyone

steps.title: Select your plate type
steps.description: Choose the floor plate that fits your needs. Browse through a variety of sizes and shapes to find the one that works best for your space

steps.description: Choose the floor plate that fits your needs. Browse through a variety of sizes and shapes to find the one that works best for your space

signin.title: Welcome Back
signin.subtitle: Please enter your credentials to continue
signin.errorMessage: Please check the form fields and try again.

signup.title: Create Account
signup.subtitle: Sign up to get started
signup.name: Full Name
signup.nameMin: Name must be at least 2 characters!
signup.passwordPattern: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, one number, and one special character and be at least 8 characters long!
signup.passwordsDoNotMatch: The two passwords do not match!

forgot.title: Forgot Password
forgot.subtitle: No worries! Enter your email address and we'll send you a verification code to reset your password
forgot.successMessage: Reset code sent successfully! Please check your email.
forgot.errorMessage: Please enter a valid email address.

checkOtp.title: Verify Your Email
checkOtp.subtitle: We've sent a 6-digit verification code to
checkOtp.resendSuccessMessage: A new verification code has been sent to your email!

setPassword.title: Create New Password
setPassword.description: Your new password must be different from previously used passwords for security
setPassword.passwordPattern: At least 8 chars, 1 uppercase, 1 number & 1 special char
setPassword.errorMessage: Please fill in all required fields correctly.

about.title: About Us
about.pText1: Welcome to Vloerplaat Koning, your specialist in high-quality floor panels. We offer a wide range of flooring solutions for both residential and commercial applications, with a focus on quality, durability, and design.
about.pText2: Our mission is to deliver the best flooring products that meet our customers' needs. We offer top-quality floor panels that are both aesthetically pleasing and durable.
about.wide_RangeText: Various materials and styles for every project.
about.customerServiceText: Advice and support from our experienced team
about.footer: Thank you for your trust in Vloerplaat Koning. We're happy to help you find the perfect floor for your project!

contact.h6Text: If you have any questions you can contact us by phone or email. We provide support or advice whenever you need.
contact.footer: Thank you for your trust in Vloerplaat Koning. We're happy to help you find the perfect floor for your project!

holes.title: Holes
holes.warningMessage: Minimum 1 drilling holes are required for mounting.
holes.addingLoading: Click on Canvas to Place Hole...
holes.pricingAlertDesc: Click inside the shape boundary to place a 6mm drilling hole.
holes.placeHoleMessage: Click inside the shape to place a drilling hole
